name: RPlog_Luke_and_Leia_versus_Sabbath
title: Luke and Leia versus Sabbath
summary: Answering a summons to Palanhi, Jedi Master Luke Skywalker confronts the Dark Jedi Lord Sabbath in the Grand Palanhi Hotel, where Sabbath threatens to kill the captive Han Solo unless Luke turns to the dark side. Sabbath baits Luke into a lightsaber duel, taunting him to give in to anger, but Luke refuses to strike even when his sister Leia and the stowaway Jessalyn arrive to back him. When Luke disarms Sabbath with the Force and demands Han's whereabouts, the Sith retaliates by blasting Leia and Luke with Force lightning before snatching his saber back and fleeing the hotel. Battered but unbroken, the trio regroups aboard the Black Dragon, where Luke chastises Jessalyn for endangering herself and despairs that they never learned where Han is held. Winter then reveals she knows Sabbath is bound for Bilbringi, where Han must be, and sets course to mount a rescue.
